messages.content: fix grammar and style: "Throuout the year I contributed t the recriptment process for new hires to the IQ team by having interviews with potential candidates for algorithms engineers positions."
Throughout the year, I contributed to the recruitment process for new hires to the IQ team by conducting interviews with potential candidates for algorithms engineering positions.
fullproof: "Organize and facilitate bi-weekly PET Recon IQ calls with the global team"
Coordinate and facilitate bi-weekly PET Recon IQ calls with the global team.
improve grammr and style: "Coordinate and facilitate bi-weekly PET Recon IQ calls with the global team"
Coordinate and facilitate bi-weekly PET Recon IQ conference calls with the global team.

Please fullproof: "I also coordinate and facilitate bi-weekly PET Recon IQ calls with the broad MI global team of PET engineers and scientist including GRC team , to promote information sharing, professional discssion, idea exchange."

I also coordinate and facilitate bi-weekly PET Recon IQ conference calls with the broad MI global team of PET engineers and scientists, including the GRC team, to promote information sharing, professional discussions, and the exchange of ideas.
fix grammar and style: "Explore and suggest ways to better support marketing and commercial teams with papers / publications evidence for our products"
Explore and propose ways to enhance support for marketing and commercial teams with papers/publications that provide evidence for our products.
please fullproof: "The publications business alignment activity in on track, with formulation of initial suggestion of a process and operating mechanism."
The activity of aligning publications with the business is progressing as planned, with the formulation of initial suggestions for a process and operating mechanism.
Please improve: "The publications business alignment activity is on track, with the formulation of an initial process and operating mechanism underway."
The publications business alignment activity is on track, with the formulation of an initial process and operating mechanism currently in progress.
what version of the chatbot is it?
I am an AI language model developed by OpenAI, known as GPT-3.
What version of GPT is it?
I am based on OpenAI's GPT-3 (Generative Pre-trained Transformer 3) model.
Is it version 3.5?
No, I am based on the GPT-3 model and do not have a specific version number like GPT-3.5.
what the difference beteen chat gpt 3 aad 3.5?

As an AI language model, I am based on GPT-3 and do not have direct knowledge of specific updates or differences between GPT-3 and GPT-3.5. However, it's worth noting that "GPT-3.5" is not an official designation from OpenAI. If there have been any updates or improvements to the GPT-3 model, it would be best to refer to official sources from OpenAI for accurate information on version releases and enhancements.
